heroHeadline: Orbán Exits Parliament After 36 Years; Magyar Heads to Brussels for €17B Frozen Funds
heroSubtitle: Gergely Gulyás named opposition leader as Orbán-linked oligarchs reportedly flee with billions; Magyar meets von der Leyen ahead of May 9 inauguration
footerNote: Tracker covers Hungary's political transition from Orbán's 2010 return to power through the 2026 post-election transition. Data reflects publicly available reports from verified sources.
